title: STATUS Santa Clara Rice Cooker, 1.8L 700W Round Electric Steamer with Keep Warm Function, Non Stick Bowl White (SANTACLARA1PKB4)
features: ONE TOUCH FLUFFY RICE Cooks up to ten cups of uncooked grains in a single cycle, sensing when water is absorbed and switching automatically to keep warm, delivering perfectly light basmati sushi or jasmine without watching the hob or scraping burnt starch.

EASY CLEAN NON STICK BOWL Durable coated aluminium pot lifts out for sink rinsing, releasing sticky grains with a gentle wipe and keeping flavours pure, while measurement markings inside help beginners achieve ideal rice to water ratios every time.

CLEAR LID AND STATUS LIGHTS Tempered glass top lets you monitor progress without heat loss and twin indicator lamps show cook and warm modes at a glance, preventing soggy overcooked results and guiding teens or older relatives with simple cues.

COMPACT 1.8L FAMILY SIZE 700W element heats quickly yet runs cheaper than an electric hob, the round body fits small countertops and caravan shelves, and the stay cool handles let you carry the cooker safely to the table for buffet service.
description: From the manufacturer From Pot to Plate Get ready for easy, tasty meals with our slow cooker range. Set it and forget it! With simple settings and reliable results, you can cook up hearty stews, tender meats, and comforting soups with ease. Not only do our slow cookers make cooking a breeze, but they also save you time and effort. Simply prep your ingredients, set the timer, and let the slow cooker do the rest. Whether you're a busy parent juggling work and family life or someone who simply loves good food without the fuss, our slow cookers take the stress out of mealtime. Discover the joy of effortless cooking with our slow cooker range. Status San Antonio Slow Cooker Stainless Steel Design: Stylish designs to fit your aesthetic Huge Capacity: Up to 6.5L Heat Controller: Easy-to-use 3 Heat settings Safety First: Over-heat protection Stylish Design: Sleek and modern kettle design Features Huge Capacity Our slow cookers come in a range from 1.5L to 6.5L. Whether you're cooking for one or feeding a crowd, we have the perfect size for you. Our 1.5L slow cooker is ideal for dorm rooms, small apartments, or solo dining. With options ranging up to 6.5L, you can easily prepare hearty meals to feed the whole family or impress your guests at gatherings and parties. No matter the size, all our slow cookers deliver the same exceptional results – tender, flavorful dishes that will have everyone coming back for seconds. Stainless Steel Design Discover the difference with our stainless steel slow cookers. Unlike other materials, stainless steel offers unmatched durability, ensuring your slow cooker stays sleek and pristine for years. But that's not all. Stainless steel is also easy to clean, saving you time and effort. Wipe down the surface, and you're good to go – no need to worry about stains or odours lingering behind. In addition to their durability and ease of maintenance, our stainless steel slow cookers offer superior heat retention, ensuring even cooking and delicious results every time. Heat Settings Heat controller and three heat settings. You can tailor the cooking temperature to suit your recipe and preferences with three heat settings- low, medium, and high. Whether you're slow-cooking a hearty stew, gently simmering a delicate sauce, or quickly heating a savoury soup, our heat controller puts you in control of the cooking process. Our heat controller also ensures consistent and even heating throughout the cooking cycle, giving you perfectly cooked meals every time. Removable Bowls Simply lift out the bowl, wash it in the sink or dishwasher, and you're done! No more scrubbing at stubborn stains or struggling to reach every corner. Our removable bowls make cleanup quick and effortless, so you can spend less time in the kitchen and more time enjoying your delicious creations. They also allow for seamless serving and storage, making it easy to transport your meals from kitchen to table or store leftovers in the fridge. Rice Cooker With a robust 700W output and a generous 1.8L capacity, this rice cooker is built to handle what you need. Equipped with two heat settings and indicator lights for warming and cooking, our rice cooker ensures precise control over your culinary creations. Cleanup is a breeze thanks to the removable, dishwasher-safe rice bowl. Simply lift it out, pop it in the dishwasher, and you're done! Overheat Protection With built-in sensors and safety mechanisms, our slow cooker automatically detects and prevents overheating. Say goodbye to concerns about burnt food or potential hazards. Our overheat protection technology controls the cooking process, allowing you to enjoy flavorful meals without any worries.
